name: DynaVap - The Captive Cap
summary: DynaVap - The Captive Cap — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The DynaVap Captive Cap has been enhanced with a redesigned functional shape, incorporating two indentations to prevent slipping and ensure consistent airflow. This updated design also helps guide the rotation of the cap and provides better tactile feedback for the clicking sound during heating and cooling. Compatible with all DynaVap devices, this feature-rich component is a valuable addition for any user. *Compatible with all DynaVap devices A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
